item.title: Its funny how everyone's idea of heaven is a complete untouc…
item.author: Jon of The North (@krauza.bsky.social)
item.description:
Its funny how everyone's idea of heaven is a complete untouched paradise, crystal clear waters, lush green forests, enough food for everyone, classless, moneyless, stateless, a Utopia of peace, unity and happiness.

But here on earth it's considered a leftist ideology.
item.content:encoded:
Its funny how everyone's idea of heaven is a complete untouched paradise, crystal clear waters, lush green forests, enough food for everyone, classless, moneyless, stateless, a Utopia of peace, unity and happiness.

But here on earth it's considered a leftist ideology.

item.title: People exposed to smoke spreading from Canadian wildfires ar…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: People exposed to smoke spreading from Canadian wildfires are at risk of a wide range of health problems. Here's how to know when the air is dangerous based on the quality index, plus some tips for staying safe. nyti.ms/4aSLV1Q
item.content:encoded: People exposed to smoke spreading from Canadian wildfires are at risk of a wide range of health problems. Here's how to know when the air is dangerous based on the quality index, plus some tips for staying safe. nyti.ms/4aSLV1Q

item.title: ラベンダーパークに、静かな訪問者が…💜🐝 今日も いいね・リポスト・リプライありがとうございました😌 おやすみな…
item.author: rinpapa1133 (@rinpapa.com)
item.description:
ラベンダーパークに、静かな訪問者が…💜🐝

今日も いいね・リポスト・リプライありがとうございました😌
おやすみなさい🥱

A quiet visitor in the lavender fields. 💜🐝

Thank you for your continued support 😊
Wishing you a peaceful day wherever you are. 😌
#Lavender #LavenderPark #Bee #FlowerPhotography #NaturePhotography
item.content:encoded:

Wishing you a peaceful day wherever you are. 😌

item.title: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: FIFA president Gianni Infan…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: FIFA president Gianni Infantino just oversaw one of the biggest controversies in World Cup history. So why is he more powerful and secure than ever? "Everyone is thinking and talking about Infantino, but nobody ever does anything."
item.content:encoded: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: FIFA president Gianni Infantino just oversaw one of the biggest controversies in World Cup history. So why is he more powerful and secure than ever? "Everyone is thinking and talking about Infantino, but nobody ever does anything."

item.title: He was a young dad, working to give his daughter a stable li…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: He was a young dad, working to give his daughter a stable life, before he was shot and killed by ICE after an attempted traffic stop. www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news...
item.content:encoded: He was a young dad, working to give his daughter a stable life, before he was shot and killed by ICE after an attempted traffic stop. www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news...

item.title: President Donald Trump’s longtime teleprompter operator is u…
item.author: CNBC (@cnbc.com)
item.description:
President Donald Trump’s longtime teleprompter operator is under investigation by federal regulators in connection with bets they allegedly made on the prediction market platform Kalshi related to statements made by Trump.

Full details: cnb.cx/3QV4kEs
item.content:encoded:
President Donald Trump’s longtime teleprompter operator is under investigation by federal regulators in connection with bets they allegedly made on the prediction market platform Kalshi related to statements made by Trump.

Full details: cnb.cx/3QV4kEs

item.title: #🔖世の中 鈴木エイト氏の逆転勝訴確定 信者への名誉毀損認めず、上告棄却 | 毎日新聞 最高裁第3小法廷（渡辺恵理子…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖世の中
鈴木エイト氏の逆転勝訴確定　信者への名誉毀損認めず、上告棄却 | 毎日新聞

最高裁第3小法廷（渡辺恵理子裁判長）は、世界平和統一家庭連合（旧統一教会）の信者が、ジャーナリストの鈴木エイトさんに名誉を毀損されたとして損害賠償を求めた訴訟で、信者側の上告を退ける決定をした。15日付。鈴木さんに11万円の支払いを命じた一審判決を取り消し、信者側の請求を棄却した二審東京高裁判決が確定...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖世の中
鈴木エイト氏の逆転勝訴確定　信者への名誉毀損認めず、上告棄却 | 毎日新聞

最高裁第3小法廷（渡辺恵理子裁判長）は、世界平和統一家庭連合（旧統一教会）の信者が、ジャーナリストの鈴木エイトさんに名誉を毀損されたとして損害賠償を求めた訴訟で、信者側の上告を退ける決定をした。15日付。鈴木さんに11万円の支払いを命じた一審判決を取り消し、信者側の請求を棄却した二審東京高裁判決が確定...

item.title: Marvel Comics is moving from NYC to Burbank, CA, the headqua…
item.author: Mediagazer (@mediagazer.com)
item.description:
Marvel Comics is moving from NYC to Burbank, CA, the headquarters of Marvel Studios, and asks 100+ NY-based employees to move to California by July 2027 (Borys Kit/The Hollywood Reporter)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink
item.content:encoded:
Marvel Comics is moving from NYC to Burbank, CA, the headquarters of Marvel Studios, and asks 100+ NY-based employees to move to California by July 2027 (Borys Kit/The Hollywood Reporter)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink

item.author: Techmeme (@techmeme.com)

item.title: その人は言ったんだ 暑さの前では皆んな負けるわよ 無理せず水分補給や エアコンは入れなさい 倒れてからでは遅いのよ…
item.author: つるぎ (@d-tsurugi.bsky.social)
item.description:
その人は言ったんだ

暑さの前では皆んな負けるわよ

無理せず水分補給や
エアコンは入れなさい

倒れてからでは遅いのよ

#一次創作
#イラスト
item.content:encoded:
その人は言ったんだ

暑さの前では皆んな負けるわよ

無理せず水分補給や
エアコンは入れなさい

倒れてからでは遅いのよ

#一次創作
#イラスト

item.title: ユーザーの皆さん、こんばんは🌙 今日一日、お仕事や勉強とお疲れ様でした😄 本日は、千代仔ちゃんの投稿に多くの評価をし…
item.author: ｈｉｋｏ１９８１.ｂｓｋｙ.ｓｏｃｉａｌ (@hiko1981.bsky.social)
item.description:
ユーザーの皆さん、こんばんは🌙
今日一日、お仕事や勉強とお疲れ様でした😄
本日は、千代仔ちゃんの投稿に多くの評価をして頂き、ありがとうございます😊そんな皆さんに深く感謝致します。
７月の半ばが過ぎて、これからますます厳しい暑い日々が続いていきますが、そんな暑さに負けずに体調良く元気に過ごしていきましょう。
それでは、明日も良い一日を。おやすみなさい😴
item.content:encoded:
ユーザーの皆さん、こんばんは🌙
今日一日、お仕事や勉強とお疲れ様でした😄
本日は、千代仔ちゃんの投稿に多くの評価をして頂き、ありがとうございます😊そんな皆さんに深く感謝致します。
７月の半ばが過ぎて、これからますます厳しい暑い日々が続いていきますが、そんな暑さに負けずに体調良く元気に過ごしていきましょう。
それでは、明日も良い一日を。おやすみなさい😴

item.title: A graduate of the Lviv National Academy of Arts, Ukrainian a…
item.author: Luca (@lucagalletti.bsky.social)
item.description:
A graduate of the Lviv National Academy of Arts, Ukrainian artist Mykola Kuryliuk works with acrylic on canvas, often featuring pop culture and astronaut themes. 😊

IG: @ mykolakuryliukstudio
item.content:encoded:

item.title: Friends look at my photos and say, "You must have a great ca…
item.author: Squatlo Bob (@squatlobob.bsky.social)
item.description:
Friends look at my photos and say, "You must have a great camera!"

I bet no one ever tastes Bobby Flay's cooking and says, "You must have a great stove!"

(sigh...)

#redtailedhawk #inflight #nature #wildlifephotography #birds
#BirdoftheDay #mustbethecamera #originalphoto #middleTN
item.content:encoded:
Friends look at my photos and say, "You must have a great camera!"

I bet no one ever tastes Bobby Flay's cooking and says, "You must have a great stove!"

(sigh...)

#redtailedhawk #inflight #nature #wildlifephotography #birds
#BirdoftheDay #mustbethecamera #originalphoto #middleTN

item.title: This is Winnie. He got so excited that he briefly forgot how…
item.author: WeRateDogs (@weratedogs.com)
item.description: This is Winnie. He got so excited that he briefly forgot how to be a dog. You can laugh, but he'd like to point out you look this ridiculous all the time. 13/10 (TT: brisbreaks)
item.content:encoded: This is Winnie. He got so excited that he briefly forgot how to be a dog. You can laugh, but he'd like to point out you look this ridiculous all the time. 13/10 (TT: brisbreaks)

Untitled, 1959
Oil, watercolor on watercolor paper
Mounted on hardboard

Inscription

Private Collection, Montana.
© Kate Rothko Prizel & Christopher Rothko /Artists Rights Society (ARS), New York

item.title: In December a 1594 edition of Snorri Sturluson's Sagas of th…
item.author: GrumpyGirdle 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿〓〓🇪🇺🇫🇷🇺🇦🇵🇸🐈‍⬛🐾📚🌊☮️ (@grumpygirdle.bsky.social)
item.description: In December a 1594 edition of Snorri Sturluson's Sagas of the Kings was sold at auction for 1.3 million Norwegian kroner to Erling Haaland. He donated it to the library in Bryne with the request that the book remain open for visitors, so people could read it rather than see it locked away
item.content:encoded: In December a 1594 edition of Snorri Sturluson's Sagas of the Kings was sold at auction for 1.3 million Norwegian kroner to Erling Haaland. He donated it to the library in Bryne with the request that the book remain open for visitors, so people could read it rather than see it locked away

item.title: INFORMAÇÃO: Lionel Messi chega à final da Copa do Mundo com …
item.author: Gustavo Mano (@mano.bsky.social)
item.description:
INFORMAÇÃO: Lionel Messi chega à final da Copa do Mundo com 8 gols marcados nesta edição.

Mas o atacante espanhol Rodri, vencedor da Bola de Ouro de 2024, pode superá-lo.

Para isso, basta que Messi não marque nenhum gol e Rodri faça 9.
item.content:encoded:
INFORMAÇÃO: Lionel Messi chega à final da Copa do Mundo com 8 gols marcados nesta edição.

Mas o atacante espanhol Rodri, vencedor da Bola de Ouro de 2024, pode superá-lo.

Para isso, basta que Messi não marque nenhum gol e Rodri faça 9.
